name: claude
description: AI coding assistant — interactive agent for software engineering tasks

name: -r
--resume
options.description: Resume a conversation by session ID

options.name: --fork-session
options.description: Create a new session ID when resuming

options.name: --append-system-prompt
options.description: Append to the default system prompt

options.name: --settings
options.description: Path to a settings JSON file or JSON string

options.name: --mcp-config
options.description: Load MCP servers from JSON files or strings

options.name: --plugin-dir
options.description: Load a plugin from a directory or .zip

options.name: --plugin-url
options.description: Fetch a plugin .zip from a URL

options.name: --allowed-tools
options.description: Comma or space-separated list of tool names to allow

options.name: --disallowed-tools
options.description: Comma or space-separated list of tool names to deny

options.name: --tools
options.description: Specify the list of available tools

name: -d
--debug
options.description: Enable debug mode with optional category filtering

options.name: --debug-file
options.description: Write debug logs to a specific file

options.name: --tmux
options.description: Create a tmux session for the worktree

options.name: --from-pr
options.description: Resume a session linked to a PR

options.name: --add-dir
options.description: Additional directories to allow tool access to

options.name: --allow-dangerously-skip-permissions
options.description: Enable bypassing permission checks as an option

options.name: --brief
options.description: Enable SendUserMessage tool for agent-to-user communication

options.name: --bare
options.description: Minimal mode: skip hooks, LSP, plugin sync

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Override verbose mode setting from config

options.name: --include-partial-messages
options.description: Include partial message chunks as they arrive

options.name: --exclude-dynamic-system-prompt-sections
options.description: Move per-machine sections from system prompt

options.name: --betas
options.description: Beta headers to include in API requests

options.name: --file
options.description: File resources to download at startup

options.name: --ide
options.description: Automatically connect to IDE on startup

options.name: --remote-control-session-name-prefix
options.description: Prefix for auto-generated Remote Control session names

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Check health of Claude Code auto-updater

subcommands.name: setup-token
subcommands.description: Set up a long-lived authentication token

subcommands.name: ultrareview
subcommands.description: Run a cloud-hosted multi-agent code review

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Check for updates and install if available
